name: Ranch Dressing
recipeInstructions:
1. Using a blender or food processor fitted with a steel blade, combine cottage cheese, yogurt, garlic, oregano, thyme, parsley, buttermilk, lemon juice, vinegar and white pepper to taste.
2. Blend until creamy and smooth.
3. Makes 3 1/2 cups. A serving of 2 tablespoons contains 36 calories and 1 gram of fat.
